default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Pamela to three core clients: DisCern, Diligent, and Yurko.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Production Volume:** DisCern (26 PSU articles/wk) and Diligent (5–7 editorial articles/wk) have large backlogs (600+ and 52+ topics, respectively), ensuring a steady workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
  - [**Pipeline Status:** DisCern's PSU pipeline is mature, requiring only fact-checking and internal linking edits. Diligent's pipeline is being built in Atlas to replace a manual Claude process.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [**Key Challenges:** DisCern's pipeline has poor internal linking. Diligent's workflow requires manual status updates in both Airtable and Optimizely, plus a separate refresh report. Yurko's Prismic CMS is a major time sink, requiring manual copy-pasting.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [**Onboarding Plan:** Pamela will focus on context this week. Ademilade will prep content for the week of Jan 5th, with Pamela's first batch due Jan 12th. A live walkthrough of key workflows is scheduled for next Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)

## Topics

### DisCern: High-Volume Programmatic Content

  - [**Client:** Legal compliance automation (registered agent, formation services).](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** Programmatic SEO (PSU) using templates in Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
      - [**Rationale:** High upfront template investment (\~3 hrs) enables rapid, low-effort article generation (\~10–15 mins each).](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
      - [**Workflow:** Create template → Load in Atlas → Generate articles.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
      - [**Review:** Client POC (Mike) reviews only the first article in each new cluster to ensure alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [**Current Focus:** "Competitor Comparisons" cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [**Types:** "Best X Alternatives," "DisCern vs. Y," "Best X for Z."](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [**Status:** Template for "Best X Alternatives" is approved.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Key Challenges:**](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
      - [**Internal Linking:** The pipeline's weakest point; often creates non-contextual or broken links.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
      - [**Images:** Pipeline-generated images are low quality; Ademilade will investigate fixes.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
      - [**Publishing:** Currently manual (via Slama). The NG team is developing an automated pipeline to fix a Webflow bug that previously broke tables.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**Production:** 26 PSU articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
      - [**Rationale:** One extra article/week is being produced to catch up on a slow start.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
      - [**Buffer:** 612 "Approved for creation" topics in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1948.0)
  - [**Refreshes:** Manual process (10–15 mins/article) to fact-check dates, fees, and links (which often break on government sites).](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)

### Diligent: Global Governance Platform

  - [**Client:** AI-enabled governance platform for global enterprises.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
      - [**Key Consideration:** Content must serve a worldwide audience, not just the U.S.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** Primarily refreshes (75%) with some net-new content.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)
      - [**Refresh Focus:** Update positioning to emphasize AI services and add original research from the Claude project.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
  - [**Pipeline Status:** Currently being built in Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Replaces a manual Claude process that generates a full article in \~30 mins.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [**Production:** 5–7 editorial articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Producing extra articles creates a buffer for Diligent's slow review process.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=2265.0)
      - [**Buffer:** 52 "Approved to start" topics in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1378.0)
  - [**Key Challenges:**](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
      - [**Dual Platform Admin:** Requires manual status updates in both Airtable and Diligent's Optimizely CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)
      - [**Multi-Team Review:** Content is reviewed by separate, non-aligned Content and SEO teams, which slows the process.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=2269.0)
      - [**Refresh Reports:** A separate report detailing changes is required for each refreshed article, generated by a prompt.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)

### Yurko: High-Effort, Lower-Value Client

  - [**Client:** Content is straightforward, but the POC is difficult and prone to scope creep.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)
  - [**Production:** 6 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
  - [**Key Challenge:** The Prismic CMS is a major time sink.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=2365.0)
      - [**Process:** Requires manual copy-pasting of content into individual "slices" (e.g., one slice per H2).](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=2381.0)
      - [**Time:** Staging one article takes 10–15 minutes.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=2365.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Engineering has not prioritized automation due to Prismic's custom nature and limited client usage.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=2422.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Ademilade:**](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
      - [Add Pamela to internal and external Slack channels.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
      - [Prep content for the week of Jan 5th.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
      - [Schedule a live workflow walkthrough for next Monday, covering:](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
          - [DisCern: Atlas template creation, internal linking fixes, Looker updates.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
          - [Diligent: Optimizely admin, refresh reports, Looker updates.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)
          - [Yurko: Prismic staging process.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=2365.0)
  - [**Pamela:**](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
      - [Review all client documentation this week.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
      - [Compile questions for the Monday walkthrough.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [Begin editing a small batch of articles for each client during the week of Jan 5th.](https://fathom.video/share/6pK1oW1mPavP8AsnogVuXrqtdgNGVLo1?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)

action_items.description: Improve DisCern image pipeline; share updates w/ Pamela
Prep Jan 5 publish-ready content for DisCern, Diligent, Yurko
Review DisCern competitor-comparison articles; finalize by Jan 12
Assign 2 articles/client to Pamela; then schedule live edit session
Apply entity-agency channel linking to DisCern pipelines; update Pamela
Migrate Diligent pipeline to Atlas; update Pamela
Schedule Mon 1:1 w/ Pamela re: Lookout/Looker, Optimizely, Airtable, DisCern templates
Schedule separate Yurko onboarding call w/ Pamela
Schedule 30-min Airtable/Content OS walkthrough w/ Pamela
